name: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh

snippets.snippet: Sudah tiga kali menginap disini, best choics

contentSummary.localeName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh

address.address1: Jalan Gajah Mada lr banteng, Drien Rampak, West Aceh Regency, Aceh, Indonesia

usefulInfo.name: License Id / Local Tax ID/ Entity Name

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options.

details.title: Infant 0-0 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 1-12 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 13 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

reviews.hotelName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewComments: Good, everything is close by, especially suitable for the visit to the Cut Nyak Din hospital, really perfect because it is right next to it, the room is comfortable.
comments.originalComment: Bagus kemana mana dekat, cocok apalagi yang lagi ada kunjungan kerumah sakit cut nyakdin emg cocok banget karna emg pas di sampingnya, kamarnya nyaman

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewNegatives: Eigentlich nichts, warmes Wasser wäre super
comments.reviewPositives: Geräumiges sauberes Zimmer. Zimmer sind rund um einen Innenhof angelegt, daher angenehm ruhig.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewComments: The family room is spacious. There is a table and chairs if you want to work. The superior room is also quite spacious. It's absolutely fine for those on a low budget.
comments.originalComment:
Family room diperluas 
Ada meja dan kursi kalau mau kerja
Superior room nya juga gak kalah luas 
Boleh banget untuk yg low budget

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewComments: Hotel ini lengkap dan bersih, dengan harga yang cukup murah. Lokasi juga dekat dengan kota dan pesisir.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewComments: Yesterday I left something behind, and the hotel staff helped send it back to me... I hope many people stay at this hotel...
comments.originalComment: Kemarin saya ketinggalan barang, dan di bantu sama pihak hotel kirimkan ke saya kembali... Semoga banyak yang nginap di hotel ini...

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewNegatives:
We arranged transport to Banda Atjeh with the receptionist. They failed to arrange it, making us wait for nothing and miss our ferry to Pulau Weh. 

If you need transport, better go to the busstation and arrange yourself

Ps. No sink (but that seems normal in Atjeh).
comments.reviewPositives: Big room, good value for money
comments.reviewTitle: Ok, but don't ask them to arrange transport

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewComments: The room is nice and comfortable, the mattress is soft, the air conditioning is cool, and the room is clean. The bathroom is nice and complete; overall, it's good. The Wi-Fi is also fast, and the price is affordable.
comments.originalComment: Untuk didalam kamarnya bagus nyaman kasurnya juga emouk ac nya dingin dan ruangan kamarnya bersih, kamar mandi bagus lengkap,keseluruhannnya bagus lah mantal wifinya juga kenceng, harha terjangkau

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewPositives:
Good location in a quiet side street, so no traffic noise. A lot of food options nearby, also grocery shops and fruit stalls. ATMs are nearby as well. For the price you pay you can not complain. AC was good, wifi worked well. 
The staff does not speak english, but they are using their mobile phones to translate -> works perfectly fine.
comments.reviewTitle: You get what you pay for

score.hotelName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewComments: The Laci-Laci was not cleaned properly, there were leftover foods from previous guests that were not cleaned up. Overall, it was GREAT!
comments.originalComment: Laci-Laci kurang di bershikan ada makanan sisa tamu sblm nya tidak di bershikan, secara umum BAGUS Banget

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewComments: The price is standard according to the facilities. It's close to the city center and there are many vendors. The air conditioning, especially in the room we stayed in, was not cold.
comments.originalComment: Harga nya standar sesuai dengan fasilitasnya. Dekat dengan pusat kota dan ramai yang berjualan. AC nya terutama di kamar kami menginap tidak dingin

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewComments: Staying at this hotel, it's located not far from dining places in the city center, the cleanliness of the room is decent, and the room facilities are fairly good according to the rate offered.
comments.originalComment: Menginap di hotel ini, letaknya TDK jauh dari tempat makan di pusat kota, kebersihan kamar lumayan, fasilitas kamar lumayan sesuai dengan rate yang ditawarkan

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewComments: The hotel location is in the city center, easy to find food, the cleanliness of the room is decent, in accordance with the price offered.
comments.originalComment: Lokasi hotel yang terletak di tengah kota, gampang cari makan, kebersihan kamar lumayan, sesuai dengan harga yang ditawarkan

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewComments: Dengan sedikit effort, hotel ini akan bisa naik kelas. Cukup dengan meningkatkan standar kebersihan, manajemen parkir, serta kualitas komunikasi staff, hotel ini akan bisa menjadi terbaik di kota Meulaboh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewComments:
+ harga murah

- Kamar basah bekas air ntah darimana
- AC tidak dingin
- Bawah kasur sangat kotor
- Buruknya lagi, saya kena denda Rp50.000 per kamar karena checkout malam hari, padahal di perjanjian awal tidak ada dan saya tidak melebihi jam batas checkout.
- Dan denda tersebut tidak masuk nota resmi. Halo? Sehat kah? 

Mencerminkan syariah kah? Sepertinya tidak, karena penuh kecurangan. Terima kasih.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewComments: This is the only RD hotel in town. If you happened to be passing by this city during your trip,  and would like to take a short break and rest only, this "lower quality of RedDoorz chain hotels" is just enough if you are looking for a budget hotel.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewComments: Really good, I like it a lot, I will stay here again later.
comments.originalComment: Bagus bgt sukak bgt nanti akan nginap sini lagi

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewComments: The room is clean, the bed is comfortable, it's a room for 2 people but there is only one towel and one bottle of mineral water. However, the gate is not open 24 hours, so it might be a bit difficult for those who go out late at night.
comments.originalComment:
Kamar bersih, tempat tidur nyaman, kamar untuk 2 orang namun handuk dan air mineral hanya tuk 1 orang
Namun gerbang tidak dibuka 24 jam jadi bagi yang keluar larut malam mungkin agak susah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewComments: Room Type Family Spacious Capacity, Cold Air Conditioning, Comfortable, Clean Bathroom, Location Close to the City. Recommended.
comments.originalComment: Kamar Type Family Luas Muat Rombongan, AC Dingin, Nyaman, Kamar Mandi Bersih, Lokasi Dekat Kota. Rekomended

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewComments: It's good, just the location is in an alley, but it's okay, I love it!😍
comments.originalComment: Bagus pokoke cuma trmpatnya aja yg masuk gang tapi tak apalah say asuka sya asuk😍

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewComments: I got room 01, the bed makes noise when we move, even just a little. It turns out that when I checked, the bed base is made of plywood, which is why it's noisy. I suggest for the accommodation to change it because it really disturbs sleep. Secondly, I got a room where the toilet doesn't flush automatically and the bidet faucet doesn't work either (no water comes out at all). The TV also doesn't work (there's no broadcast at all). And the Wifi password wasn't provided right away during check-in. As for cleanliness, it's okay, the location is good next to RSUD Cut Nyak Dhien Meulaboh. The AC is okay, I got 2 towels, a toothbrush, and there's soap as well. The shower is okay. The water is clear and good. The bathroom is clean.
comments.originalComment: Aku dapat kamar 01, ranjangnya bunyi2 ketika kita gerak, wlpun gerak sikit. Ternyata setelah aku cek alas ranjangnya adalah kayu triplek mknya bunyi, saran untuk penginapan semoga bisa di ganti, krna itu sangat mengganggu tidor. Yg kedua aku dapat kamar yg closet nya gk bisa siram otomatis + keran cebok nya jga gk fungsi ( gk keluar air sama sekali). Tv nya jga gk fungsi ( gk ada siaran sama sekali). Dan sandi Wifi-nya tidak langsung di beri tau ketika check-in. Untuk kebersihan ok, lokasi ok disamping RSUD Cut Nyak Dhien Meulaboh . AC nya ok, dapat handuk 2, dapat sikat gigi dan ada sabun jga . Shower nya ok. Air nya bagus jernih. Kamar mandi bersih.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah @ Jalan Gajah Mada Meulaboh
comments.reviewComments: Let's travel together with Agoda... it's the best.
comments.originalComment: yuuk bersamaa Agoda... is the best
